workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: I have this email thread from Blue Yonder Airlines that needs build the narrative. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 14:08 EST
Subject: URGENT: territory planning Issue at Blue Yonder Airlines

Our team encountered some challenges with territory planning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-02-22 17:29 EST
Subject: territory planning - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with territory planning. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Blue Yonder Airlines: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-L trap (Proposed pipeline note duplicates content already in MSX); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-L failure mode (Proposed pipeline note duplicates content already in MSX)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-L -- Proposed pipeline note duplicates content already in MSX
